From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

(Redirected from [FIBA Europe Under-18 Championship](/w/index.php?title=FIBA_Europe_Under-18_Championship&redirect=no "FIBA Europe Under-18 Championship"))

International men's juniors basketball tournament

For the women's competition, see [FIBA U18 Women's EuroBasket](/wiki/FIBA_U18_Women%27s_EuroBasket "FIBA U18 Women's EuroBasket").

FIBA U18 EuroBasket

The **FIBA U18 EuroBasket**, formerly the **FIBA U18 European Championship**, and originally the **FIBA European Championship for Juniors**[[1]](#cite_note-1)[[2]](#cite_note-2) is an annual men's youth [basketball](/wiki/Basketball "Basketball") competition contested by the under-18 national teams from [FIBA Europe](/wiki/FIBA_Europe "FIBA Europe").

The inaugural tournament was in [1964](/wiki/1964_FIBA_Europe_Under-18_Championship "1964 FIBA Europe Under-18 Championship"), and was held biennially until [2002](/wiki/2002_FIBA_Europe_Under-18_Championship "2002 FIBA Europe Under-18 Championship"). Since [2004](/wiki/2004_FIBA_Europe_Under-18_Championship "2004 FIBA Europe Under-18 Championship"), the competition has been played every year. The tournament serves as qualification for the [FIBA Under-19 World Cup](/wiki/FIBA_Under-19_World_Cup "FIBA Under-19 World Cup") in even numbered years. The current champions are [Spain](/wiki/Spain_men%27s_national_under-18_basketball_team "Spain men's national under-18 basketball team").
